name: @tubevault/engine
description: yt-dlp + ffprobe SUBPROCESS adapter: pure argv builders (throttle-by-default), zod progress parsing, detached spawn + process-group kill, dir-scan result resolution, 0600 cookie tmpfiles + secret redaction. Fake yt-dlp fixture + dual-run contract suite (real yt-dlp behind TUBEVAULT_SMOKE=1).
